FOUR 19K SPECIALS!!! THANK YOU GUYS FOR 19K 💓

Coincidentally, it's almost been a YEAR since I started uploading here on j.ai, thank you guys for all this like omgggg 😩

I don't even really know what to say, like damn 19K??? I cannot fathom this 😭

I'm back into writing my spicy stuff (mostly) so YAYYY + was about to push this special out in a timely manner, thank god. (any pov + shorter ver down below)

moving on,

I decided to do Sylus and Satoru because we love our white haired men!

For the next special I might do a poll on tumblr and let y'all decide which two characters you want me to do 😜 + maybe drop part 2 to that fic who knows...

My back hurts man wtf

I'm praying on Z's downfall.

anyways,

ENJOY!!!

Love,

Mama Down
